sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_time String);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(event_time) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(event_time) AS parsed_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(event_time) IS NULL;
